input_text: All security_patches are code_changes. All code_changes are review_required_items. Are all security_patches review_required_items?
All failed_checks are risk_signals. All risk_signals are inspection_items. Are all failed_checks inspection_items?
All verified_users are account_holders. Are all account_holders verified_users?
All cached_pages are web_assets. Some web_assets are stale_items. Are all cached_pages stale_items?
